description_long: This is a modern, rectangular lounge sofa with a clean, boxy silhouette and a teal-colored fabric exterior. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are flush with the frame and appear to be firmly attached. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend the full depth of the sofa, matching the height of the backrest for a uniform look. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with visible seam lines outlining the edges and separating the cushions. The base of the sofa is not visibly elevated, suggesting short or recessed legs, and the overall design is minimalist with no decorative embellishments. This lounge would be suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor plazas.
description: A modern teal lounge sofa with a boxy frame, straight armrests, and smooth, solid upholstery. Features two large seat and back cushions integrated into a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two seat and back cushions, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth, armrest thickness, and the flush alignment of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid back panel and the continuous, unbroken backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and cushion alignment from the opposite side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large backrest cushions, all flush and attached, spanning the full width; no loose or corner cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, rectangular backrest at full sofa width and medium height, with no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, wide, and matching the backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting short, recessed, or block-style legs, likely wood or metal.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid teal color with smooth texture and visible seam lines; no patterns or tufting.
